rationale: This is a live-action POV "rush home to play" hook built explicitly around Tetris Block Party — the palette (purple/gold/white), block-puzzle context, and solo cozy framing have nothing to do with Crowd City's bright primary-color, low-poly stickman swarm loop. Mechanic fit is near-zero: there's no way to demo crowd-gathering or consume-to-grow satisfaction inside this format without rebuilding the creative from scratch. Audience overlap exists at the broad-casual level, but a single-creative cluster from one advertiser with no proven crowd-genre lift makes this a low-priority test — skip unless you reshoot a Crowd City–specific POV variant.
